mnemonics.title: MITM Attack Goals
mnemonics.content: STEAL: Steal sensitive information, Tamper with data, Eavesdrop on conversations, Alter data, Loot sensitive information

mnemonics.title: Types of Eavesdropping
mnemonics.content: ACTIVE: Altering data, Capturing sensitive information, Tampering with data, Injecting malware, Viewing sensitive information, Eavesdropping on conversations

mnemonics.title: Prevention Techniques
mnemonics.content: SECURE: Secure communication protocols, Encrypt data, Certify authenticity, Use secure networks, Recognize suspicious activity, Evaluate security measures

mnemonics.title: Detection Techniques
mnemonics.content: CHECK: Certificate pinning, Hash-based authentication, Evaluate public keys, Check for malware, Keep software up-to-date
